name: send_message
description: Send a message via Telegram, WhatsApp, Signal, SMS or any other configured messenger provider. ALWAYS call this directly when the user says 'send/schick' + a messaging provider — do not ask for confirmation, do not first check the provider list. Recipient values: 'mir' / 'ich' / 'me' / 'myself' (sends to the Klacks owner — looked up in Settings -> Owner-Messenger card), or a contact name like 'Heribert' (looked up in the Mitarbeiter Messenger tab for the requested provider type), or a literal phone number / Telegram chat ID. Provider parameter: 'telegram' / 'whatsapp' / 'signal' / 'sms' / 'threema' etc.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: The messaging provider name (e.g., telegram, whatsapp)

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: Recipient identifier. Use 'mir' / 'ich' / 'me' / 'myself' to send to the Klacks owner — the skill looks up the Owner-Messenger jsonb setting and resolves the requested provider type to a chat ID / phone. Otherwise pass a contact name (e.g. 'Max Muster') which is resolved against the Klacks Mitarbeiter Messenger tab for the requested provider type, or a literal phone number / Telegram chat ID that is sent through unchanged.

name: read_messages
description: Read recent messages from messaging providers. Shows incoming and outgoing messages with sender, content, and timestamp.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: Filter by provider name (e.g., telegram, whatsapp)

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: Filter by sender phone number or ID

name: list_messaging_providers
description: List all configured messaging providers with their name, type, and enabled status.
